  1. com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.continuous

Uses of Package
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.continuous

Packages that use com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.continuous
Package
Description
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.continuous.plugins
 
  • Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.continuous used by com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.continuous.plugins
    Class
    Description
    CmaEsStrategyModel
    CMA-ES strategy model with evolution paths, rank-1/rank-mu covariance updates, cumulative step-size adaptation, and IPOP-like internal restarts.
    CopulaBaselineModel
    Gaussian copula baseline with empirical marginals.
    DiagonalGaussianModel
    Diagonal Gaussian model for continuous EDAs (Σ = diag(σ^2)).
    FullGaussianModel
    Full-covariance Gaussian model (N(μ, Σ)) with Cholesky sampling.
    GmmModel
    Diagonal-covariance Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) with EM fitting.
    KdeModel
    Kernel Density Estimation (KDE) model with Gaussian kernels.
    NormalizingFlowModel
    Lightweight flow-based density model for continuous EDAs.
    SNesModel
    Separable Natural Evolution Strategies (sNES) model.
    XNesModel
    Exponential NES (xNES) full-covariance model.
